subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto one of Our maidservants who hath borne tribulations in Our path and afflictions in Our love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی امه من امائی التی حملت الشداید فی سبیلی و الکربه فی حبی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
